diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,164 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware, CreateHandlersInterface
+- Reads as: Hono, HonoOptions, Env, H, HandlerResponse, Input, IntersectNonAnyTypes, MiddlewareHandler
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/hono, src/hono-base, src/types
+- Safe summary: Factory helper provides initApp, createApp, createMiddleware functions plus CreateHandlersInterface for combining handlers with support for 1-10 handlers.
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: Context, GET_MATCH_RESULT, RouterRoute, getPattern, splitRoutingPath
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/route/index.ts, src/context, src/request/constants, src/types, src/utils/url
+- Safe summary: Route helper provides functions to get matched routes and path information from context for debugging and logging.
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket, WSReadyState, WSContext, createWSMessageEvent, WebSocketHelperDefineContext, defineWebSocketHelper
+- Reads as: Context, MiddlewareHandler, TypedResponse, StatusCode
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/context, src/types, src/utils/http-status
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper provides WSContext interface and defineWebSocketHelper for creating WebSocket connections with event handling.
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: Context, parse, parseSigned, serialize, serializeSigned
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/context, src/utils/cookie
+- Safe summary: Cookie helper provides functions for getting, setting, and deleting cookies including signed cookies with prefix options.
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: hc, Client types, ClientRequestOptions, Hono, Schema, ExecutionContext
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/client, src/client/types, src/context, src/hono, src/types
+- Safe summary: Testing helper creates a testClient wrapper that wraps the hc function with custom fetch for testing.
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents
+- Reads as: Context, Runtime
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/context
+- Safe summary: Adapter helper provides an env function that detects and returns runtime environment variables for different platforms (node, deno, bun, workerd, fastly, edge-light).
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: createCssContext, css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, rawCssString, ClassNameSlug, OnInvalidSlug
+- Reads as: html raw, DOM constants, createCssJsxDomObjects, common exports
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/html, src/jxs/constants, src/jxs/dom/css, src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Safe summary: Experimental CSS helper provides css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition functions for server-side rendering, exports common utility functions.
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, isPseudoGlobalSelectorRe, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, SELECTOR, CLASS_NAME, STYLE_STRING, SELECTORS, EXTERNAL_CLASS_NAMES, rawCssString, minify, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon
+- Reads as: no direct reads, internal css utilities
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Internal CSS helper functions for common CSS-in-JS operations, class name generation via hashes, CSS minification, and building style strings from templates.
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: HTTPException, Request Header
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/proxy/index.ts, src/http-exception, src/utils/headers
+- Safe summary: Proxy helper wraps fetch with hop-by-hop header removal, content-encoding deletion, and strict RFC 9110 compliance option for header validation.
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: Hono, Env types, RouterRoute, color utility, handler utils
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/dev/index.ts, src/hono, src/types, src/utils/color, src/utils/handler
+- Safe summary: Dev helper prints routes in a nice table format with handler names, supports verbose mode and color output, detects router name.
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: escapeToBuffer, raw, resolveCallbackSync, stringBufferToString
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html/index.ts, src/utils/html
+- Safe summary: HTML helper provides raw and html functions for creating escaped HTML strings with callback support for lazy rendering.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: re-exports ssg module, middleware exports (SSGConstants, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG), plugins (defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin)
+- Reads as: ssg.ts, middleware exports, plugins
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins
+- Safe summary: SSG helper entry point that re-exports main SSG module functionality, SSG middleware functions, and default plugins for static site generation.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: generateFilePath, parseResponseContent, defaultExtensionMap, determineExtension, combineBeforeRequestHooks, combineAfterResponseHooks, combineAfterGenerateHooks, SSGPlugin, ToSSGInterface, ToSSGAdaptorInterface, toSSG
+- Reads as: client utils, Hono, Env, Schema, pool utils, mime utils, SSG middleware, plugins, utils functions
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/client/utils, src/hono, src/types, src/utils/concurrent, src/utils/mime, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: Main SSG logic fetches route content via pool of requests parallelization, converts responses to files, supports hooks and plugins, handles errors gracefully, ensures files stay in output directory.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateR
